channel.title: Dirac Equation on OkongOyangO's Notes
channel.description: Recent content in Dirac Equation on OkongOyangO's Notes

item.title: 🤪 Bulk-Boundary Correspondence: Dirac Equation, Wilson Loop, and Entanglement Spectra
item.author: yzj5306@psu.edu (OkongOyangO)
item.description: This note aims to discuss the Bulk-Boundary Correspondence (BBC) in topological band theory, including its dispersion relations and numerical verification of its real-space localization behavior, as well as rigorous proofs using formalisms such as the Dirac equation, Wilson Loop, and Entanglement Spectrum.
